tasks.description: Pick up a primitive cube from the tabletop.
tasks.successCondition: The cube is lifted from the table.

tasks.description: Pick and place one primitive cube on top of another.
tasks.successCondition: The moving cube is centered on the base cube and remains stable.

tasks.description: Move a sphere from its initial tabletop position to a randomized target.
tasks.successCondition: The sphere reaches the target position.

tasks.description: Pick up a thin stick and tilt it in the pour-stick primitive.
tasks.successCondition: The stick is lifted and reaches the target tilted pose.

tasks.description: Open a cabinet door with a bolted single-joint articulation.
tasks.successCondition: The cabinet door reaches the target open state.

tasks.description: Pick a YCB rigid object and place it at a goal pose.
tasks.successCondition: The object reaches the target pose.

tasks.description: Pick up two YCB rigid objects within one episode.
tasks.successCondition: Both target objects are grasped and lifted.

tasks.description: Open a tabletop door with a revolute joint.
tasks.successCondition: The door joint passes the target open threshold.

tasks.description: Pull a tabletop drawer outward along its prismatic joint.
tasks.successCondition: The drawer joint passes the target open threshold.

tasks.description: Open a microwave door around its hinge.
tasks.successCondition: The microwave door reaches the target open state.

tasks.description: Turn a faucet handle from its initial pose toward the target turned state.
tasks.successCondition: A faucet handle reaches the target turned state.

tasks.description: Rotate a knob to a target angle.
tasks.successCondition: The knob reaches the target rotation.

tasks.description: Press a button along its prismatic joint.
tasks.successCondition: The button reaches the pressed state.

tasks.description: Flip a switch from the off state to the on position.
tasks.successCondition: The switch reaches the on state.

tasks.description: Grasp a hammer by its handle and drive a nail into a board.
tasks.successCondition: The nail is driven in while fingertip contacts avoid forbidden target zones.

tasks.description: Grasp a power drill and place its bit on a target spot with aligned axes.
tasks.successCondition: The drill bit reaches the target with valid alignment and safe fingertip placement.

tasks.description: Grasp a tomato-soup can and pour into a bowl.
tasks.successCondition: The can is lifted into a pouring pose without invalid contact.

tasks.description: Grasp a mug and pour into a target container.
tasks.successCondition: The mug is lifted into a pouring pose without grasping the rim.

tasks.description: Grasp a wineglass, lift it, and tilt it past the pouring threshold.
tasks.successCondition: The wineglass is lifted and tilted with the opening directed downward.

tasks.description: Grasp a kettle by its handle and pour over a mug.
tasks.successCondition: The kettle is lifted into a pouring pose without grasping the spout.

tasks.description: Grasp a pan by its handle and place it flat on a stove burner.
tasks.successCondition: The pan reaches the target flat pose without grasping the cooking surface.

tasks.description: Grasp a bleach bottle with affordance-aware contact.
tasks.successCondition: The bottle is lifted into a pouring pose without grasping the nozzle.

tasks.description: Grasp a cup while avoiding the rim.
tasks.successCondition: The cup is lifted into a pouring pose without grasping the rim.

tasks.description: Lift a cup off a wooden cup-holder and place it upright at a goal spot.
tasks.successCondition: The cup reaches the goal while upright.

tasks.description: Grasp a bucket by its articulated handle.
tasks.successCondition: The bucket handle reaches the target grasp or raised state.

tasks.description: Lift a bucket off the table using its handle.
tasks.successCondition: The bucket is lifted from the tabletop.

tasks.description: Grasp a pot via its handle affordance.
tasks.successCondition: The pot is manipulated using the intended handle affordance.

tasks.description: Lift a lid off a container.
tasks.successCondition: The lid reaches the target open or lifted state.

tasks.description: Hold a laptop base and open its lid around the hinge.
tasks.successCondition: The laptop lid reaches the target open state.

tasks.description: Hold and squeeze a pair of scissors to actuate the hinge.
tasks.successCondition: The scissor hinge reaches the target state.

tasks.description: Hold a utility knife body and slide its blade out from the handle.
tasks.successCondition: The blade extends while the knife body remains controlled.

tasks.description: Stabilize a shopping basket and raise one of its handles.
tasks.successCondition: A basket handle reaches the target raised state.

tasks.description: Hold a stapler body and open its upper arm around the hinge.
tasks.successCondition: The stapler top arm reaches the target open state.

tasks.description: Hold a flat folder and open its top flap around the hinge.
tasks.successCondition: The folder flap reaches the target open state.

tasks.description: Hold a pair of glasses and unfold the temple arms.
tasks.successCondition: Both temples reach the target open state.

tasks.description: Open a folding-phone hinge while stabilizing the phone body.
tasks.successCondition: The phone hinges reach the open state while the phone is controlled.

tasks.description: Hold a centrifuge tube and unscrew its cap.
tasks.successCondition: The cap reaches the target unscrewed state.

tasks.description: Open both doors of a free-body cabinet with coordinated timing.
tasks.successCondition: Both doors reach the target open state within the required time window.

tasks.description: Push a T-shaped block to a target pose.
tasks.successCondition: The T-shaped object overlaps the target pose.

tasks.description: Push a large sphere up a tabletop slope.
tasks.successCondition: The sphere reaches the goal region.

tasks.description: Push a small sphere uphill while avoiding obstacles.
tasks.successCondition: The sphere passes the target line.

tasks.description: Pick a designated target object from many distractor objects.
tasks.successCondition: The designated object is successfully picked from clutter.

tasks.description: Extract a thin object from a small open-top container.
tasks.successCondition: The thin object reaches the extraction goal.

tasks.description: Use wall support to pivot a large thin cuboid upright.
tasks.successCondition: The cuboid reaches the target upright pose.

tasks.description: Pivot and extract a book from a shelf full of neighboring books.
tasks.successCondition: The book reaches the target pose.

tasks.description: Insert a peg into a socket.
tasks.successCondition: The peg is aligned and inserted into the socket.

tasks.description: Pick up a pen, bring it vertical, and seat it in a pen holder.
tasks.successCondition: A pen tip is inserted into the holder opening.

tasks.description: Pick up a pipette, bring it vertical, and seat its tip in a glassware flask.
tasks.successCondition: The pipette tip is inserted into the flask neck.

tasks.description: Insert a charger plug into an outlet.
tasks.successCondition: The plug tip is aligned and inserted into the receptacle.

tasks.description: Thread a nut onto a bolt.
tasks.successCondition: The nut is centered and threaded to the target depth.

tasks.description: Mesh two gears together.
tasks.successCondition: The gear is centered and seated in the target mesh position.

tasks.description: Lift a shopping basket with both hands.
tasks.successCondition: The basket is lifted and kept level.

tasks.description: Lift a carton with both hands.
tasks.successCondition: The carton is lifted clear of the tabletop.

tasks.description: Lift a Dutch oven with both hands.
tasks.successCondition: The Dutch oven is lifted from the table.

tasks.description: Lift a serving tray with both hands while keeping it level.
tasks.successCondition: The tray is lifted and kept level.

tasks.description: Pass an object from one hand to the other.
tasks.successCondition: The object is transferred between hands with the required force-thresholded contact.

tasks.description: Open a microwave, retrieve an item, close the microwave, and place the item at a goal.
tasks.successCondition: All microwave retrieve-and-place stages complete in order.

tasks.description: Take a mug off a holder, pour milk, place the mug on a coffee machine, and turn the knob.
tasks.successCondition: All coffee-making stages complete in order.

tasks.description: Open an oven, place salmon inside, close the door, and complete the baking sequence.
tasks.successCondition: All oven-bake salmon stages complete in order.

tasks.description: Place a pot on a stove burner and pour water from a bottle into the pot.
tasks.successCondition: The pot and poured contents reach the required cooking setup.

tasks.description: Sort objects into the appropriate drawer or trash receptacle.
tasks.successCondition: Objects are in their assigned receptacles and the sequence completes.

categorySummary.keyChallenge: Geometric pick, place, stack, and bolted single-joint articulation goals.
Affordance-aware grasping with valid contact regions, tool alignment, or handle use.
Actuating object joints while stabilizing a freely moving body.
Pushing, extraction, pivoting, and environmental contact without a clean top grasp.
Precise alignment under sustained contact and tight receptacle constraints.
Two-hand stabilization, cooperative lifting, or hand-to-hand transfer.
Sequential multi-stage procedures composed from primitive capabilities.
